Title: Test User Creation
Test Data:
- id: 1
- Password: correctPassword
- Email: user@example.com
- Name: John
- Cognome: Doe
Test Steps: 1. Create a new user with the provided test data.

Title: Test User Password Change
Test Steps: 1. Change the password of the user with the provided test data.

Title: Test User Email Change
Test Steps: 1. Change the email of the user with the provided test data.

Title: Test User Name Change
Test Steps: 1. Change the name of the user with the provided test data.

Title: Test User Surname Change
Test Steps: 1. Change the surname of the user with the provided test data.

Title: Test Product Creation
Test Data:
- Name: Test Product
- Luogo: Test Location
- Immagine: Test Image
- Prezzo: 10.00
- Proprietario: User with id 1
Test Steps: 1. Create a new product with the provided test data.

Title: Test Product Ownership Change
Test Data:
- id: 1
- New Proprietario: User with id 2
Test Steps: 1. Change the ownership of the product with the provided test data.
Expected Result: The ownership of the product is changed successfully.

Title: Test Product Price Change
Test Steps: 1. Change the price of the product with the provided test data.
Expected Result: The price of the product is changed successfully.

Title: Test Product Image Change
Test Steps: 1. Change the image of the product with the provided test data.
Expected Result: The image of the product is changed successfully.

Title: Test Product Location Change
Test Steps: 1. Change the location of the product with the provided test data.
Expected Result: The location of the product is changed successfully.

Title: Test User Ownership of Non-Existent Product
Test Steps: 1. Try to assign a non-existent product to the user.
Expected Result: An error is thrown because the product does not exist.

Title: Test User Ownership of Existing Product of Another User
Preconditions: Two users and a product have been created.
Test Data:
- User 1 id: 1
- User 2 id: 2
- Product id: 1
Test Steps: 1. Try to assign the product to User 1, which is not the current owner.
Expected Result: An error is thrown because User 1 is not the current owner of the product.

Title: Test Product Price Validation
Test Steps: 1. Try to set a negative price for the product.
Expected Result: An error is thrown because the price must be a positive number.

Title: Test Product Image Validation
Test Steps: 1. Try to set an invalid image for the product.
Expected Result: An error is thrown because the image is invalid.

Title: Test Product Location Validation
Test Steps: 1. Try to set an invalid location for the product.
Expected Result: An error is thrown because the location is invalid.
